backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend for an ocarina composer app, with CRUD operations for songs and user profiles, protected by access control via included authorization and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (inline preset naming, sheet music image upload, MusicXML/MIDI import, etc.) to their corresponding source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document providing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's React component and utility structure.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing global state (notes, song metadata, UI dialogs) and composing all major UI sections including the sheet music upload dialog, song load/save flow, and ocarina visual/keyboard.
frontend/src/components/CompositionContr: Playback controls component that sequences notes using the Web Audio API with ADSR synthesis or sample-based playback, and provides duration selection and clear actions.
A dialog-based editor component that allows users to toggle hole coverage patterns for each note on a 4-hole ocarina fingering chart, with support for saving named custom presets.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A simple footer component displaying the copyright year and a 'Built with caffeine.ai' attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: A sticky header component displaying the 'Ocarina Composer' app title with a music icon and subtitle.
frontend/src/components/HolePositioningE: An interactive drag-and-drop editor for repositioning ocarina hole overlays on a background image, with support for rotation controls, touch events, and save/reset actions.
A settings panel component that aggregates controls for hole shape, body shape, model rotation, scale, colors, photo upload, and fingering chart configuration.
frontend/src/components/OcarinaTablature: A small visual component that renders a 2x2 grid of ocarina holes showing the fingering pattern (covered/open) for a given pitch.
frontend/src/components/OcarinaVisual.ts: Renders the main ocarina visual with either a user-uploaded photo or a styled SVG body, overlaying draggable holes that reflect the active note's fingering pattern with rotation and scale transforms.
frontend/src/components/PianoKeyboard.ts: A piano keyboard UI component that displays the playable natural notes for a selected ocarina size preset (Small/Medium/Large) and fires a callback when a note key is clicked.
frontend/src/components/SampleUploadMana: React component for managing audio sample assignments to musical notes, supporting file uploads, preset saving/loading/deleting, and switching between a synth mode and custom sample presets.
frontend/src/components/SheetMusic.tsx: Displays a horizontal scrollable sheet music view of composed notes with duration symbols, note names, ocarina tablature diagrams, selection/deletion interactions, and an editable lyrics section.
frontend/src/components/SheetMusicUpload: Component for importing notes from image, MusicXML, or MIDI files via drag-and-drop or file picker, with transposition to fit the selected ocarina preset and a replace/append import mode.
frontend/src/components/SongMetadata.tsx: Form component for editing and saving song title, description, lyrics, and notes to the backend, supporting both creating new songs and updating existing ones via React Query mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous Internet Computer actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomHolePosition: Hook that manages custom ocarina hole positions persisted in localStorage, providing getters, per-hole setters, and a reset-to-defaults function based on the selected body shape.
frontend/src/hooks/useFingeringChart.ts: Hook that manages the ocarina fingering chart state persisted in localStorage, exposing methods to update individual note patterns and reset to the default chart.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useModelRotation.ts: Custom hook that manages the ocarina model's rotation (0/90/180/270 degrees), persisting the value to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useModelScale.ts: Custom hook that manages the ocarina model's scale (50–200%), persisting the clamped value to localStorage with a reset function.
frontend/src/hooks/useOcarinaColors.ts: Custom hook that manages ocarina body and hole colors with per-property setters and a reset-to-defaults function, persisting state to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useOcarinaPhoto.ts: Custom hook that manages an optional ocarina photo stored as a base64 data URL in localStorage, with upload and remove functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useOcarinaSize.ts: Utility hook that reads and writes the ocarina size preset (Small/Medium/Large) to localStorage, dispatching a custom event on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for listing, creating, updating, and deleting songs via the backend actor, with cache invalidation on mutations.
Custom hook that manages per-note audio sample assignments (note → base64 data URL), persisting the record to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useSamplePresets.ts: Custom hook that manages named sample assignment presets (including a built-in Synth preset), persisting presets and the active preset to localStorage.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens (colors, radius, sidebar, charts).
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/types/fingering.ts: Defines TypeScript types and constants for ocarina fingering patterns, hole IDs, note names, size presets, and a helper to compute notes per size preset.
frontend/src/types/shapes.ts: Defines shared `HoleShape` and `BodyShape` union types ('round' | 'oval' | 'square') used across components.
frontend/src/utils/defaultFingeringChart: Exports the default 4-hole ocarina fingering chart covering all three octave ranges (C4–C7) as a FingeringChart record.
frontend/src/utils/holeLayout.ts: Exports a `getHoleLayout` function that returns fixed x/y positions for the four ocarina holes relative to a 384×224px container.
frontend/src/utils/midiParser.ts: Parses a MIDI binary file (ArrayBuffer) into an array of Note objects by reading MIDI headers, tracks, and note-on/off events, converting MIDI note numbers to pitch names and tick durations to named durations.
frontend/src/utils/musicXMLParser.ts: Parses a MusicXML string into an array of Note objects by extracting pitch, octave, accidental, and note-type elements from the XML DOM, skipping rests and chord duplicates.
frontend/src/utils/noteTransposer.ts: Transposes an array of Notes to fit within the playable range of a given ocarina size preset, adjusting octaves and resolving enharmonic equivalents, and returns counts of transposed and skipped notes.
frontend/src/utils/sheetMusicParser.ts: Attempts to extract notes from a sheet music image file using canvas-based heuristic analysis, detecting staff lines and note heads to map vertical positions to pitches; recommends MusicXML/MIDI for reliable results.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both regular and hash-based routing), persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive parameters from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, content paths, custom theme tokens (colors using OKLCH variables, fonts, border radii, shadows, animations), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 31) for a 4-hole ocarina tablature music writing app, including feature list, architectural notes, requirements, and known issues.
